 {"id":"br-3vwi.12","title":"[track] Rollout governance, release gates, and feedback loop","description":"## Purpose
Control rollout risk with explicit release gates, observability checks, and fallback plans across TUI, web UI, and static export deployments.

## Scope
- Feature gating/staged rollout strategy.
- Go/no-go criteria tied to quality/perf/parity metrics.
- Monitoring checklist and incident fallback procedures.
- Post-launch review loop and bead feedback process.
- Deployment readiness checks for GitHub Pages and Cloudflare Pages export targets.

## Outcome
V2 rollout is deliberate, measurable, reversible, and parity-safe.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
- Rollout and fallback strategy is explicit and executable.
- Go/no-go checklist references objective quality/performance/parity/doc gates.
- Post-launch telemetry feedback loop is operationalized into follow-up beads.
- Launch readiness is auditable from linked evidence artifacts, including web/static export checks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-09T20:47:39.017224943Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T00:25:21.674008544Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["governance","ops","release"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.12","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-09T20:47:39.017224943Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.12","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-09T20:47:43.345973172Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.12","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-09T20:47:43.498913129Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.12","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:25:21.673967547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.12","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-09T20:47:43.192109855Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":86,"issue_id":"br-3vwi.12","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation note: treat this track as a self-contained mini-epic.  {"id":"br-3vwi.13","title":"[track] Python web UI parity + static export platform (GH Pages + Cloudflare Pages)","description":"## Purpose
Guarantee full externally observed parity with the legacy Python web UI while delivering a production-quality Rust web UI and deterministic static export workflows.

## Scope
- Full parity map for routes, list/detail views, filtering behavior, markdown rendering, actions, and diagnostics.
- Rust web UI implementation of all required surfaces.
- Shared behavior contracts between MCP tool outputs, TUI, and web UI.
- Static export pipeline to GitHub Pages and Cloudflare Pages with deterministic output and working search/navigation.
- Deployment and verification workflows for both static targets.
- Startup/transport compatibility contract so existing agents using `http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp/` can connect without reconfiguration or port/path changes.

## Non-Negotiable Constraint
No deliberate behavior drift from Python web UI unless explicitly approved and documented with migration rationale.

## Testability
- Parity conformance suites for Python-vs-Rust observed behavior.
- Browser E2E and snapshot tests for core web workflows.
- Static-export conformance tests for route integrity, search behavior, and deterministic artifact hashing.
- Startup/handshake conformance tests for fixed default endpoint and client initialization compatibility.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
- A complete Python-web-to-Rust parity matrix exists and every row is implemented or explicitly waived with rationale.
- Rust web UI exposes all required user-visible functionality with parity test coverage.
- Static export works for GitHub Pages and Cloudflare Pages with deterministic outputs and functional navigation/search.
- Existing client configurations targeting `http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp/` initialize successfully without transport/path surprises.
- Unit/integration/browser-E2E/export-conformance suites pass with forensic logging artifacts.
- Rollout gates require parity evidence before declaring this track complete.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"FrostyLantern","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:22:41.908097174Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T05:37:28.587648600Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["export","parity","static-site","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.13","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:22:41.908097174Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.13","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:25:20.807094696Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.13","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:25:20.977347145Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-3vwi.13","depends_on_id":"br-3vwi.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:25:21.149521463Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

+| Web parity surfaces (`/mail/*`) | Phase 0 → 1 → 2 → 3 | Deployment cohort (host/project ring), no hidden compatibility shim | Roll back server binary and redeploy previous release |

+| Build slots / worktree behavior | Phase 0 → 1 → 2 → 3 | `WORKTREES_ENABLED=true` only after canary evidence | Set `WORKTREES_ENABLED=false`, restart |
